notes:
The behavior varies with subsequent tries.

Either Origin does not load at all (after clicking "Play" on Steam, the button signifies "Loading" before changing to "Close" for a second and exiting out), loads the initial "connecting" window and crashes (sometimes with a crash report window), or occasionally goes to what I assume is the first Origin window as it has a menu bar before crashing (again only sometimes with a crash report window).

Origin will also usually spawn 5-7 small blank windows with the "connecting" window that eventually will disappear after a crash. I've also tried Proton-GE versions as well (17+) but it does not change anything.
